CHO-012 T-12345 | New payment approval workflow

Definition of 'Done'

Changes reflected in repository along with a Pull-Request
Changes are ready in EOD DEV
Developer tests completed successfully
Documentation is completed
Draft "Completed in QA" email sent internally and attached
Creation of Non-DEV ticket (if needed)
Odoo/Trello card update

Key communication points

Acceptance of functionality attached

Original Request

Full name

Jane Doe

Role

Original email/file with request

Client & module

ACME AP

Original HelpDesk Ticket (SH/HD)

Title

•New payment approval workflow

Description

As an AP user I want a configurable approval workflow.

Change Order Reason

•Given the client's need for a configurable approval workflow, additional development is required.

Conditions of Satisfaction

Behavior changes

○The system will show a new approval workflow setting.

ERP Integration Conditions

○The ERP should receive the approval status.
